title: NoRender+
description: Allows you to stop rendering particles,overlays,world  and entity good for pvp and fps
body:
---

☕ Support My Work

If you would like to support me and my projects, feel free to buy me a coffee!


--- ## NoRender NoRender is a lightweight optimization mod for Minecraft that gives you full control over what your client renders. By disabling overlays, unnecessary entities, and particles, it can significantly improve FPS and reduce visual clutter. ## Key Features * GUI: Set a keybind to open the configuration GUI. * Entity Control: Hide dropped items, item frames, armor stands, experience orbs, and more. * Particle Control: Disable particles including explosions, campfire smoke, block breaks, totem particles, and others usefull for PvP and performance. * Overlay Removal: Remove screen effects like fire, pumpkin blur, portal shifts, nausea tilt, darkness, and vignette. ## Configuration Categories * Overlays: portal, fire, nausea, darkness, pumpkin, vignette, spyglass, liquid, in-wall overlays, and HUD potion icons. * World & Entities: Disable weather, totem pop animations, dropped items, item frames, armor stands, and other environmental effects. * Particles:explosions, fireworks, campfire smoke, hearts, eating, block breaks, totems, potions, sonic booms, vibrations, sculk effects, and more.
